title: Determine Whether Matrix Can Be Obtained By Rotation
titleCn: 判断矩阵经轮转后是否一致

testcases.input: mat = [[0,1],[1,0]], target = [[1,0],[0,1]] Output: true Explanation: We can rotate mat 90 degrees clockwise to make mat equal target.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can rotate mat 90 degrees clockwise to make mat equal target.

testcases.input: mat = [[0,1],[1,1]], target = [[1,0],[0,1]] Output: false Explanation: It is impossible to make mat equal to target by rotating mat.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: It is impossible to make mat equal to target by rotating mat.

testcases.input: mat = [[0,0,0],[0,1,0],[1,1,1]], target = [[1,1,1],[0,1,0],[0,0,0]] Output: true Explanation: We can rotate mat 90 degrees clockwise two times to make mat equal target.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We can rotate mat 90 degrees clockwise two times to make mat equal target.
